Class AbstractAutoServiceRegistration<R extends Registration>

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.client.serviceregistry.AbstractAutoServiceRegistration<R>
Type Parameters:
R - Registration type passed to the ServiceRegistry.
All Implemented Interfaces:
EventListener, AutoServiceRegistration, org.springframework.context.ApplicationListener<org.springframework.boot.web.server.context.WebServerInitializedEvent>
public abstract class AbstractAutoServiceRegistration<R extends Registration> extends Object implements AutoServiceRegistration, org.springframework.context.ApplicationListener<org.springframework.boot.web.server.context.WebServerInitializedEvent>
Lifecycle methods that may be useful and common to ServiceRegistry implementations. TODO: Document the lifecycle.
Author:
Spencer Gibb, Zen Huifer
